title: astragalus fontanesii subsp. numidicus
intro: Astragalus fontanesii subsp. numidicus, also known as Numidian milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to North Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant's roots and leaves have been traditionally used to support immune function, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being, providing health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health and enhanced antioxidant defenses. Herbal preparations of Astragalus fontanesii subsp. numidicus include extracts, teas, and capsules, which can be used to support health and wellness.
